postCreateCommand: pip install . && pip install pandas matplotlib && export API_KEY=$(curl -s https://storage.googleapis.com/research-share/claude_public_key.txt)
postStartCommand: cp examples/Soccer.plnb /tmp/Soccer.plnb && nohup plainbook /tmp/Soccer.plnb > /tmp/plainbook.log 2>&1 & sleep 10 && grep 'Authentication token' /tmp/plainbook.log
